name: gh-gist
description: GitHub Gist artifact provider. URIs `gh-gist:<gist-id>` (gists are globally scoped, not repo-scoped). Public or secret. Lock = gist owner; cross-user writes require a transfer. Used as the storage for the per-user presence gist (`workflow-user-lock-<user>`) and as an opt-in spillover for large execution state. contract_version 1.
